scene_flow: Animated intro with the brand logo and a value proposition for NBA fans.
Fast-paced montage of NBA team matchups (Lakers/Celtics, Thunder/Spurs, Knicks/Mavericks) with betting odds.
Text overlay emphasizing live streaming capabilities on Winamax TV.
Transition to a community-focused message with a phone UI showing the app icon.
Final call to action to join the community with app store badges.
on_screen_text: PARIE ET REGARDE GRATUITEMENT LA NBA SUR L'APPLI WINAMAX !
LES PLUS GROSSES AFFICHES EN LIVE SUR WINAMAX TV
TU N'ES PAS LE SEUL À AIMER LE SPORT
audience_proxy: French-speaking male sports enthusiasts aged 18-35 who follow the NBA and enjoy sports betting.
